title: Ship
subtitle: Pre-flight checks → tag → push → deploy
footer: Every check is a clickable card. Green = go, yellow = caution, red = blocker. Fix reds before shipping.

choices.label: Pre-flight check
choices.description: Tests, lint, typecheck, secrets, airplane-mode. One click, full matrix.

choices.label: Cut a release
choices.description: Bump version, write changelog, tag, push, create GitHub release.

choices.label: Deploy
choices.description: Vercel / Fly.io / Cloudflare — pick target, run deploy script.

choices.label: Rollback
choices.description: Revert latest deploy + restore previous version. Idempotent.
